MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT, MV TRANSPORTATION , INC., CHI VONG's Motion To Transfer Venue.

OFF CALENDAR as moot. On October 31, 2018, the court signed an order transferring this action to San Mateo County.
